text_raw: Welcome...
text_clean: Welcome...

text_raw: to the honored guests of today's hunt.
text_clean: to the honored guests of today's hunt.

text_raw: Kakh...
text_clean: Kakh...

text_raw: I see... a most special guest has arrived.
text_clean: I see... a most special guest has arrived.

text_raw: A noble soul, driven by your mission.
text_clean: A noble soul, driven by your mission.

text_raw: Yet here, we stand as equals.
text_clean: Yet here, we stand as equals.

text_raw: Clawing for survival.
text_clean: Clawing for survival.

text_raw: And dying like a beast.
text_clean: And dying like a beast.

text_raw: I draw my bow as righteousness demands.
text_clean: I draw my bow as righteousness demands.

text_raw: You know full well why you must die.
text_clean: You know full well why you must die.

text_raw: Fear not, your suffering will only be a moment.
text_clean: Fear not, your suffering will only be a moment.

text_raw: I'm no longer {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Nairah#Naira}'s student—my skills have long surpassed hers.
text_clean: I'm no longer {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Nairah#Naira}'s student—my skills have long surpassed hers.

text_raw: Now, let us bring this hunt to a close.
text_clean: Now, let us bring this hunt to a close.

text_raw: You coward... Why not run a bit farther while you're at it?
text_clean: You coward... Why not run a bit farther while you're at it?

text_raw: Ugh...!
text_clean: Ugh...!

text_raw: You demon...!
text_clean: You demon...!

text_raw: I'm taking you...
text_clean: I'm taking you...

text_raw: We'll meet again on the other side...!
text_clean: We'll meet again on the other side...!

text_raw: This isn't over yet!
text_clean: This isn't over yet!

text_raw: Running away? You disappoint me!
text_clean: Running away? You disappoint me!

text_raw: This hunt is rather entertaining!
text_clean: This hunt is rather entertaining!

text_raw: Let's see if you can dodge this!
text_clean: Let's see if you can dodge this!

text_raw: Run all you want, your fate is mine to decide.
text_clean: Run all you want, your fate is mine to decide.

text_raw: Beg for your life, just like the pathetic captive you are!
text_clean: Beg for your life, just like the pathetic captive you are!

text_raw: I've long dreamed of the day I'd end you!
text_clean: I've long dreamed of the day I'd end you!

text_raw: Your suffering is nothing but a step in the path of righteousness.
text_clean: Your suffering is nothing but a step in the path of righteousness.
